description: Support response payload returned by a BPP to a BAP in the /beckn/on_support callback. Contains the support ticket reference, available contact channels, SLA commitment, and optional consumer acknowledgement details.
title: SupportResponse

refId.description: Reference identifier (typically the order ID) against which support was requested.

ticketId.description: Support ticket identifier assigned by the BPP.

descriptor.description: Human-readable label for this support response.

channels.description: Available support channels with contact details.

value.description: Contact value (phone number, email address, URL, etc.)

sla.description: Service level agreement for this support response.

responseTime.description: Expected initial response time as ISO 8601 duration (e.g., PT2H).

resolutionTime.description: Expected resolution time as ISO 8601 duration (e.g., P1D).

consumer.description: The consumer the support response is addressed to (optional).
